title: The Quintessential Quintuplets Custom GUI Pack
description: The Quintessential Quintuplets Custom GUI Pack
body: **![](https://i.imgur.com/YGxzX16.png)** **Introduction:** This GUI-only resource pack is themed around "The Quintessential Quintuplets." It can be used with other resource packs by placing it on top of your current pack. I've customized various elements of the UI, including the hot bar, and experimented with different images for each container. The chosen palette is blue and orange, but I’m open to other color suggestions like pink and white for future updates. **Community Engagement:** Feel free to leave feedback or report any bugs you find so I can make improvements. [ ](https://listar-mc.net/) [ ](https://listar-mc.net/) **Upscaled to 512x512+** - scaled the container - scaled the pictures - remade the minecraft logo ![upscaled](https://i.imgur.com/xb9euMy.png) **Feature Highlights:** - **Hud:** ![Hud](https://i.imgur.com/1SSzq1F.png) - **Settings:** ![Settings](https://i.imgur.com/Y0w3Kx4.png) - **Anvil:** ![Anvil](https://i.imgur.com/lJ1ZvgP.png) - **Crafting Table:** ![Crafting Table](https://i.imgur.com/ejAS9an.png) - **Shulker Box:** ![Shulker Box](https://i.imgur.com/0EItoki.png) - **Cartography Table:** ![Cartography Table](https://i.imgur.com/8RuoZMH.png) - **Loom:** ![Loom](https://i.imgur.com/E2RgWpI.png) - **Brewing Stand:** ![Brewing Stand](https://i.imgur.com/aiEKCgu.png) - **Furnace:** ![Furnace](https://i.imgur.com/nu2oZPB.png) - **Chest:** ![Chest](https://i.imgur.com/K03no2I.png) - **Beacon Menu:** ![Beacon Menu](https://i.imgur.com/T6LT55v.png) - **Villager Trading Menu:** ![Villager Trading Menu](https://i.imgur.com/iccl7Lu.png) **Additional Resources:** - Explore more packs on [ListarMC](https://listarmc.com/) - Join our [Discord server](https://discord.gg/RvScgzj3Ph) for suggestions, voting on future packs, and anime discussions **Thank you for your support! ❤️**
